title: Choose between allow/3 and shared mode for a spawned Task
prompt: A test spawns a single `Task.async/1` inside its body that queries the Repo. The test wants to keep `async: true`. Write `docs/choose_allow.md` recommending `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.allow/3` (NOT shared mode) and explain why. Must state: (1) allow/3 preserves async, (2) shared mode would force async: false, (3) allow/3 is the right reach here.
research_citation: "Because allowances use an explicit mechanism, their advantage is that you can still run your tests in async mode." — Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox docs
